hero_heading: Earned a Thumbs Up Friday? Come and cash it in.
hero_paragraph: Every Friday we cook for every student who's earned a Thumbs Up Friday card. Bring your card, pick your reward, cupcake, brownie, or whatever's on that week.

steps.title: Earn a card
steps.text: A member of staff gives you a Thumbs Up Friday card for something great! effort, kindness, achievement, anything worth celebrating.

steps.title: Bring it on Friday
steps.text: Every Friday we're cooking. Bring your card to the canopy at the time on the timetable and hand it over.

steps.title: Pick your reward
steps.text: Cupcake, brownie, or whatever we've made that week! your card, your treat.

treats_text: Check the timetable page for collection times and this week's bake.
